reviews.review_title: Fun But I Don't Like the Controls
reviews.review_description:
Good base game , but i really don't like the controls. I understand the design for hand tracking but if i want to use the controllers just let me grab the ball. The controllers track so well, I just want the ball to move with the controller.

I know I can grab the ball with a controller but it pivots around its center it doesn't just let me grab the ball. I don't want to ball that's mounted in on a virtual pivot I want to grab the ball and have it moves as if it was attached to the controller.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for the feedback!

You can use the controllers as well, just pick them up and grab the ball :)

reviews.review_description:
This is a great start. The physics feel good (although the sensitivity for left-right controls feels higher than that of the forward-back controls - maybe that's just me), the puzzles are creative, and the VR backgrounds are crisp and nicely done.

It could use some more content. There aren''t a lot of levels/puzzles here, even for the low price. I hope the devs continue to update with more variety going forward.

This is definitely a no brainer for VR, worth the purchase! The devs are some real ones for creating this and can’t wait to see more levels and games to come from them! Highly recommended. 

One note I do have is that it can be kind of hard to grab with the controllers, i have to keep clicking the grip button over and over even when i feel i should be able to grab from where i am. It makes time trials harder to complete. Though haven’t tried with hand tracking yet. Just would like to see improvements in that area. Also hope to see more mazes soon! That would be awesome!

I used to love these games as a kid, and didn't expect it to transition into the 21st century that easily!
Basically, it's a game where you navigate a ball through a maze to the goal, using your hands, carefully avoiding pits and barriers. I find it to be a near-perfect execution of this premise, brought accurately into the MR realm. Obviously, there's no physical feedback, but this game gets you as close as possible to playing the century-old kid's toy/arcade hit. 

For such a low price, this should be a no-brainer for you if you're into these kinds of puzzlers, and it'll surely help you build up dexterity and accuracy, so I imagine it being both fun and therapeutic.

I surely hope this game will get updated with new levels and challenges and remain the most definitive rendition of this puzzle ball premise.

The tutorial is easy to understand, the gameplay is smooth, and the tracks are both fun and challenging. Can't wait to have more mazes, and I would love to have a feature to show the worldwide fastest solve when you finish a level and see your rank next to your fastest solve time. The physics are also extremely smooth and the size feature is so comfy! I played both sitting and standing, and found myself cuddled up in a ball trying to find an optimal track route. Totally worth getting this game.
Wow! Unique puzzle game. Reminds me of old retro games. With a super cool modern spin twist turn. Very addictive. Different from the normal games. Love it
A must play for anyone who like puzzles

The hand gestures are so natural to me it almost feels like I am holding the ball
Good job!!
Very cool and fun

reviews.review_title: A Must-Play for Puzzle Lovers in VR!
reviews.review_description:
I had so much fun playing Maze Ball VR! It’s one of those games that’s simple to pick up but super addictive once you start. The way you tilt and move the ball feels so natural in VR, and every level gives that perfect mix of challenge and satisfaction. Some puzzles really make you think, but that just makes it even more rewarding when you beat them!

If you love classic maze games or just want a relaxing but engaging VR experience, I highly recommend giving this one a try. It’s definitely worth it!
Thanks for that great game

Mazeball is really engaging, the combination of intricate mazes, with is intuitive tilts, turns and upside downs are so much fun, and the realistic physics of the ball creates a gameplay experience that feels challenging whilst staying fun. And my coordination is truly challenged as I spin the dome around!!
The MR mechanics are smooth, responsive, and incredibly satisfying. I found myself completely lost (in the best way possible) in its labyrinthine mazes.  
Whether you're a casual player or a hardcore puzzle fan. Mazeball offers something for everyone. It’s the kind of game that keeps you coming back for "just one more level." I will keep coming back to this one most def… Highly recommended

Such a well designed game with an original idea!
I love it, puzzle games in mid air for AR and Mixed Reality heads are such a magical experience. Well done!

🥳

The maze puzzles that simulate the toys we all remember from our childhood are a bit underwhelming unless you're really trying hard to get a high score, but they work great as a soft intro before you try the track levels.

As a casual gamer, those get devilishly hard.

The flexibility is a very nice touch, you can play in mixed reality block out the world, you can resize and reposition the puzzle as you like.

All in all, a fun little game well worth its price

This is annoyingly addictive lol

The mazes start nice and simple, but gets harder once you progress.
The movements are good and feels like your playing with the real thing.
I haven’t tried hand tracking yet, but even with controllers it’s still good.

Nicely done and I think it will take some serious steady hands to beat the whole thing.

Well done developers 👍🏻

This is a cool, unique ball/puzzle game.

Can play in MR or with a background picture.
You can resize the ball and adjust height to your comfort level. Can be played sitting or standing.

Can use hand tracking or controllers.

You then grab hold of the puzzleball and manoeuvre it, with the aim of collecting stars and then getting to the cup, which is the end.
Things start off nice and simple, but difficulty soon ramps up.. with you having to be very gentle and slight with your movements to keep the ball on the track… with you flipping, twisting, turning and rotating your way through each puzzle.

Start with simple straight runs, and labyrinth style… but soon get to moving platforms, lava, multi levels ect…

You can even bring up a table off the fastest times and scores… and connotes against your friends times.

The hand tracking is very good and accurate.
The sounds are fun.
Graphics are very good.

I think developers did a great job with this game and I would recommend to puzzle fans … with steady hands.

When you find a gem like this, all of the VR community need to know about it.
The Polish on this game is simply just incredible.
The dev brings an old school marble madness game to VR.
It’s only early access but oh boy, it looks and plays astonishingly well.

I literally want to get on every leaderboard.
It has mixed reality mode, amazing backdrops too, you can use hand tracking if you want as well.

The movement of the ball is so on point, if it doesn’t go where it’s supposed to, that’s.
Absolutely just buy this game.on.

I’m so impressed what’s been done on this game
Absolutely just buy this game, it’s a no brainier.
This game is so much fun! it's just like Perplexus, but even better!!!
Great puzzle game.
I really liked playing! I like pass through games that you can play while not being disconnected from the environment, and this game is a perfect fit!
